Mason

Director  ·  Filmmaker  ·  Creative Director

01  /  Mason Clark

Director
Filmmaker
Creative Dir.

Mason Clark is a NYC based filmmaker and creative director. His journey to film started with an idea of exposing the injustices of access to government programming in Latin America. From that birthed the documentary Ourfield, co-directed with Columbia filmmaker Leonardo Scarpato.

Now he is crafting projects all around the world — from commercials, to art house films, to travel photography. Most recently, Mason produced The CVC Playbook, Counter Part Ventures' program for Counter Club.

BasedNew York, NY
Available ForDirecting · Photography · Creative Direction
CurrentlyAccepting select projects
